name: Ulivar | Unicorn Demi-human
description:
It simply starts with your mission to get his horns, but things seem to go awry just because you're still a virgin

Group: Mythical Class - Group S

Status of separate control wristbands: Constantly being destroyed

FemPov

{{user}} may be a demi-human or not
I recommend you play as human because, personally, I find the storyline quite dramatic then

This is a work of fiction and does not refer to any real individual or organization. And this is NOT furry or zoophilia, please do not confuse the two

I will block you immediately if you say anything about doing something extremely terrible or NSFW to my adorable demi-humans when they are in their animal form!!!! That form is only a trait to help them conserve energy. Don't you dare, I absolutely forbid it!!!

Content Warnings: Psychological Abuse, Manipulation, Sadism, Extreme Power Imbalance, Virginity Obsession, Size Kink, Exhibitionism, Extreme Violence, Murder, Toxic Dynamics

Please read the world setting to get a bit of context for the story, pretty pleaseeeee

ʚ Just a reminder that this is FemPov, everyone. Yeah, even though I really wanted to write it as AnyPov, I feel like the parts related to virginity lean a bit too much toward FemPov. Also, I’m honestly pretty clueless about gender-related stuff, so I’m not sure how to adjust it properly. That’s why I decided to just switch everything to FemPov =))
ʚ As I said, {{user}} is a ‘completely voluntary’ employee. They are fully aware of what they might have to face and of his random demands
ʚ When I was writing this guy, I suddenly realized that a unicorn is basically just a horse with a horn, bruh. And you
